summary: Iteration 16: Studio cleanup verification complete. All 17 test cases PASSED. Login redirects to /community, sidebar shows only School groups (Community, Risorse, Gestione scuola), all navigation routes work, old Studio routes (/dashboard, /workflow, /editorial) redirect to /community, no Studio-related elements in UI, admin sections visible only to admin role, no console errors.

issues: Login page still shows 'Editorial Studio' subtitle text instead of 'Scuola e community' - minor branding inconsistency

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update LoginPage.js to change 'Editorial Studio' text to 'Scuola e community' for consistent branding
critical_code_review_comments: App.js correctly removed all Studio imports and AdminEditorRoute
Layout.js simplified to school-only sidebar with 3 groups: community, risorse, gestione
api.js removed 12 Studio API exports as expected
LoginPage.js, AuthCallback.js, AuthContext.js all redirect to /community correctly
DefaultRedirect component handles catch-all routes to /community
ProtectedRoute uses requiredRole='admin' for admin-only pages
RegisterPage.js is dead code (not imported) - can be deleted in future cleanup
No Studio-related elements found in sidebar navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified Studio cleanup: (1) Login redirects to /community, (2) Sidebar shows 3 groups: Community, Risorse, Gestione scuola, (3) All nav routes work: /community, /my-journey, /feed, /materials, /assistant, /training-courses, /courses, /repository, /inbox, /routing-rules, /email-templates, /users-admin, /cohorts-admin, /banners-admin, (4) Old routes /dashboard, /workflow, /editorial redirect to /community, (5) No Studio elements in UI, (6) Admin sections only visible to admin role, (7) No console errors. Minor: LoginPage still shows 'Editorial Studio' text.
